project_type: Bash installer and management scripts for a Go+Vue panel application
build_system: Bash scripts; go build for Go binary; npm for frontend
test_framework: bash -n for syntax validation; shellcheck for linting if available
build_command: bash -n install.sh && bash -n node-install.sh && bash -n koris.sh && bash -n deploy.sh
test_command: bash -n install.sh && bash -n node-install.sh && bash -n koris.sh && bash -n deploy.sh && bash -n deploy-report.sh
verification_instructions: All scripts pass bash -n syntax check. No hardcoded inconsistencies between paths.
environment_constraints: No systemd, mysql, or network services available for integration testing. Validation is limited to syntax and static analysis.
contribution_requirements: Scripts use set -euo pipefail (or set -e). Follow existing color/logging conventions. Keep interactive prompts for install.sh/node-install.sh.
key_patterns: install.sh installs the full panel (Go binary + frontend + MariaDB + FreeRADIUS + Nginx). node-install.sh installs the node agent only. deploy.sh handles updates. koris.sh is the management CLI. deploy-report.sh posts diagnostics to GitHub Issues.
directory_structure: Root level: install.sh, node-install.sh, deploy.sh, deploy-report.sh, koris.sh. scripts/: install-node.sh, install-openvpn-scripts.sh, openvpn/. panel/systemd/: panel.service. node/systemd/: node-agent.service.
